name: Towards Valid Student Simulation with Large Language Models
summary: arXiv conceptual and methodological framework for valid LLM-based student simulation, centered on the competence paradox, Goal-by-Environment framing, and Epistemic State Specification.

access_attempts.notes: arXiv PDF was downloaded and text-extracted for the competence paradox, ESS reporting card, goal-aligned fidelity guidance, and limitations.
